mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoption (animal_id, animal_name, animal_type, animal_avatar, user_id, user_name, user_phone, user_address, reason, status, create_time) VALUES (#{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{animalType}, #{animalAvatar}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{userAddress}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE adoption
status = #{status},
reject_reason = #{rejectReason},
reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
reviewer_name = #{reviewerName},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM adoption WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id as animalId, a.name as animalName, a.type as animalType, a.avatar as animalAvatar, a.location as userAddress FROM animal a WHERE a.life_status = '待领养' ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT ad.*, a.avatar as animalAvatar FROM adoption ad LEFT JOIN animal a ON ad.animal_id = a.id WHERE ad.status = 'approved' ORDER BY ad.update_time DESC
